reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 생각보다 사이즈가 작은데 목부분, 귀 바스락소리까지! 아기강아지들에게 더 강추해요~~~ 물고다니기 쉽게 되어있고 물고 잘 뛰어다녀요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than I expected, but it has crinkly sounds on the neck and ears too! I'd especially recommend it for puppies~~~ It's easy for them to carry around and they run around really well with it in their mouth ㅎㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 보들보들 고퀄 인형이에요 너무 귀엽고 예뻐요!
reviews.content_en: It's such a soft, high-quality plush toy! It's so cute and pretty!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: My dog loves throwing it around and playing with it, but he chews and tears it up pretty quickly, so I keep buying it regularly ㅎ Sure enough, as soon as the package arrives, he gets so excited and plays with it right away ㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 귀여워요~양쪽 귀도 만지면 바스락 거려요~ 사이즈는 미니미해요~ 만족해요~^^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute~ Both ears make crinkly sounds when you touch them~ The size is really mini~ I'm satisfied~^^

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 꺄~보들보들 토끼 인형 넘 기여워여~넘 잘 갖고 놀아서 재구매 했어요~ㅎㅎ 또 구매하려구여^^
reviews.content_en: Aww~ Such a soft and fluffy bunny plush, it's super cute~ My pup loves playing with it so much that I've repurchased it~ㅎㅎ Planning to buy it again^^

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 오자마자 귀여워서 소리질렀어요 저희집 애기말고 제가 가지려고 했는데 들켜서 뺏겼어요 ^^
reviews.content_en: I screamed when it arrived because it was so cute! I wanted to keep it for myself instead of giving it to our puppy, but I got caught and it was taken away from me ^^

reviews.content:
선물 주려고 구매했어요 
바잇미 젤리곰 정도 사이즈에요 
귀엽네요🤍
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift 🤍 It's about the same size as BITE ME jelly bears 🤍 It's really cute!

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 인형 완전 기여워영~보들보들 부드럽구 애기도넘  잘 갖고 놀아여~ 또 구매하려구여^^
reviews.content_en: The plush is super cute~ It's so soft and fluffy and my pup loves playing with it~ Planning to buy it again^^

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 토끼 턱받이의 바스락거림과 귀 부분을 특히 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog especially loves the crinkly sound from the bunny's bib and the ear part ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 토끼인형 터트려서 새로운걸로 사줬는데 인형 엄청 기여워여
reviews.content_en: My dog tore up the bunny plush so I got him a new one, and it's incredibly cute

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
생각보다 사이즈가 좀 작은데 
강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요~ 
항상 바잇미는 배송도 빠르고 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It's a bit smaller than I expected, but my dog plays with it really well~ BITE ME always has fast shipping and great service!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빨랐어요! 강아지가 장난감 좋아하는데~ 잘 가지고 놀아서 좋네요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast! My dog loves toys and he plays with this one well, so I'm happy ㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! Great as an attachment toy

reviews.name: 늅****
reviews.content_en: It's way too cute! I want to keep it for myself

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content_en: The bunny toy is so incredibly cute

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content_en: He plays with it really well! Love it!
